name: Chocolate Butter Cream Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the cocoa in the hot water.
2. Beat the powdered sugar with the cocoa mixture until smooth.
3. Add the egg yolks and vanilla, then beat until fluffy.
4. Remove from heat and place over a bowl of ice and water to cool slightly.
5. Gradually add the softened butter, four additions at a time, beating until the frosting is lighter in color and thick enough to spread.
6. Frost the cake.
7. Refrigerate until set.
